semantic.role: Architectural rule document for maintaining clean architecture boundaries
responsibilities: Define rule against direct DB imports
outOfScope: Other rules in the rule set

English.purpose: To prevent tight coupling between business logic and database implementations by enforcing a rule that service layers must not directly import database adapters.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine project who need to understand and adhere to the project's architectural constraints. It is part of a set of architectural rules that define how components should interact.
key_takeaways: Direct imports from src/db/* are prohibited in application services.
Use service abstractions or repository interfaces instead.
The rule is enforced with 'error' severity in the codebase.
